title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Jura. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is Boécourt; Courrendlin; Courtételle; Haute-Sorne; Les Bois; Les Breuleux; Le Noirmont; Saignelégier. The MLR is a region composed of limestone rocks, which are permeable and have difficulty retaining water, forming a succession of shallow valleys and high plateaus. It is covered by forest and wooded pasture. Milk and cheese production are the first agricultural resource of the massif. Temperature vary strongly between summer and winter and the annual rainfall are abundant ( 1000 mm). Clock-making by farmers in the form of peasant clockmakers has been practiced since the Middle Ages and offers a cultural heritage to the region.

title: Interest on this VC

title: Key local assets
description: Before refrigerators, the acidification of cream was done without human intervention. The raw milk was stored in a cool place for several days. The cream would rise to the surface and, as it aged, acquire a sour taste through bacterial transformation. The recipe has maintained this old artisanal production technique which is a strong cultural asset.
